buildCommand: cd backend && bun install && bun run build && cd ../frontend && bun install && bun run build && cd .. && mkdir -p .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func .vercel/output/static && cp api/index.js .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func/index.js && echo '{"runtime":"nodejs20.x","handler":"index.js","launcherType":"Nodejs"}' > .vercel/output/functions/api/index.func/.vc-config.json && cp -r dist/* .vercel/output/static/ && echo '{"version":3,"routes":[{"src":"/api","dest":"/api/index"},{"src":"/api/(.*)","dest":"/api/index"},{"handle":"filesystem"},{"src":"/(.*)","dest":"/index.html"}]}' > .vercel/output/config.json
